query: SELECT p.id, p.addressLine1, p.city, p.state, p.owner1Name, p.leadSource, p.leadTemperature, p.createdAt FROM properties p WHERE p.id = 2190001; SELECT n.id, n.noteType, LEFT(n.content, 200) as content_preview, n.createdAt FROM notes n WHERE n.propertyId = 2190001 ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC;
